# Carpenterwala - Comprehensive Knowledge Base & Technical Services Overview

## 1. About Carpenterwala
Carpenterwala operates a verified technician marketplace operating across Bangalore, Karnataka, India. All service providers undergo police verification, skills testing, and upfront transparent pricing alignment.

## 2. Interactive Calculation Engines
### Water Wastage & Tap Drip Cost Calculator
- Location: https://carpenterwala.com/services/plumbing#calculator
- Purpose: Quantifies municipal and tanker water wastage in Indian homes resulting from slow dripping taps, leaking flush valves, or pipe pinholes.
- Methodology: Converts drip frequency (e.g., 10 to 120 drops per minute) into daily/monthly litres and financial loss based on Bangalore tanker water costs (~₹1.50/L).

### Electricity Appliance Consumption & Wastage Calculator
- Location: https://carpenterwala.com/services/electrical#calculator
- Purpose: Calculates power consumption (kWh / units) and monthly electricity bill increases caused by faulty wiring, inefficient appliances (ACs, Water Heaters/Geysers, Microwaves), and standby voltage leakage.
- Methodology: Maps appliance wattage against daily operational hours and BESCOM slab rates.

### Wall Painting Area & Cost Estimator
- Location: https://carpenterwala.com/services/painting#calculator
- Purpose: Computes exact wall surface area, paint litres needed (1 coat vs 2 coats + primer), and total material + labor budget for residential flats.

## 3. Detailed Service Directory
- Carpentry: Door repair, lock replacement, wooden bed repair, wardrobe assembly, modular kitchen cabinet adjustments.
- Painting: Fresh interior painting, repainting, exterior weather proofing, wall putty application, dampness treatment.
- Electrical: Switchboard repair, MCB tripping resolution, main line wiring, ceiling fan installation, inverter setup.
- Plumbing: Blocked drain clearing, tap washer replacement, commode fitting, overhead tank cleaning, pump repair.

## 4. Primary Service Hubs in Bangalore
- Koramangala, Indiranagar, Whitefield, HSR Layout, Thanisandra, Hebbal, Yelahanka, Bellandur, Marathahalli, Electronic City.
